summary: The user is reorganizing their bathroom and seeking tips to maximize space in a small area. They also discussed maintaining good oral hygiene and healthy skin, particularly during winter, and shared their enjoyment of a bath bomb from Lush as part of their self-care routine.
facts: The user replaced the liner and cleaned the bathroom trash can with soap and hot water last week. The user is considering over-the-toilet cabinets or shelves with baskets for bathroom storage. The user has been trying to floss every day and keeps floss picks in a container on the bathroom counter. The user has been using a moisturizer from a free sample at Sephora that has made their skin feel soft and smooth. The user plans to exfoliate more regularly and use a humidifier to combat dry skin. The user has been taking more baths lately and uses a bath bomb from Lush that turns the water pink and smells amazing about once a week. The user is interested in maintaining good oral hygiene and is looking for recommendations for toothpaste and mouthwash. The user has been trying to establish a better habit of flossing every day.
